meta.summary: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 RNA-seq statistics runtime with stable helper CLIs for downstream flows.
meta.description: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 RNA-seq statistics runtime with stable helper CLIs for downstream flows.

test: Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript (R) version 4.6.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(BiocManager::version()) == "3.23")' && rnaseq-runtime-info | grep -F 'Bioconductor	3.23' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("DESeq2","edgeR","limma","tximport","tximeta","apeglm","ashr","sva","RUVSeq","ggplot2","pheatmap","ComplexHeatmap","matrixStats","readr","data.table","jsonlite","rmarkdown","optparse"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'

rnaseq-deseq2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'DESeq2 differential expression helper' >/dev/null && rnaseq-tximport --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'tximport helper' >/dev/null && rnaseq-pca --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'PCA helper' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bioc-pca && cd /tmp/taf-bioc-pca && printf '%b\n' 'gene_id\ts1\ts2\ts3\ts4' 'geneA\t10\t11\t40\t42' 'geneB\t50\t48\t12\t13' 'geneC\t4\t5\t6\t7' 'geneD\t100\t98\t105\t110' > matrix.tsv && printf '%b\n' 'sample\tcondition' 's1\tcontrol' 's2\tcontrol' 's3\ttreated' 's4\ttreated' > samples.tsv && rnaseq-pca --matrix matrix.tsv --metadata samples.tsv --group-column condition --top-var 4 --log2 --outdir out && test -s out/pca_scores.tsv && test -s out/pca_plot.pdf && grep -F 'PC1' out/pca_scores.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bioc-tximport/s1 /tmp/taf-bioc-tximport/s2 && cd /tmp/taf-bioc-tximport && printf '%b
' 'Name	Length	EffectiveLength	TPM	NumReads' 'tx1	1000	900	20	40' 'tx2	900	800	10	20' 'tx3	800	700	5	10' > s1/quant.sf && printf '%b
' 'Name	Length	EffectiveLength	TPM	NumReads' 'tx1	1000	900	30	60' 'tx2	900	800	15	30' 'tx3	800	700	2	4' > s2/quant.sf && printf '%b
' 'sample	file' 's1	s1/quant.sf' 's2	s2/quant.sf' > samples.tsv && printf '%b
' 'tx_id	gene_id' 'tx1	geneA' 'tx2	geneA' 'tx3	geneB' > tx2gene.tsv && rnaseq-tximport --samples samples.tsv --tx2gene tx2gene.tsv --type salmon --outdir out && test -s out/counts.tsv && test -s out/abundance.tsv && test -s out/tximport.rds && grep -F 'geneA' out/counts.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bioc-deseq2 && cd /tmp/taf-bioc-deseq2 && Rscript -e 'set.seed(23); genes <- paste0("gene", sprintf("%02d", 1:40)); base <- rep(c(8,12,20,35,60,100,160,240), 5); effect <- rep(c(1,1,1.2,0.8,2.5,0.4,1.8,0.6), 5); cmat <- sapply(1:3, function(i) rnbinom(length(base), mu=base, size=8)); tmat <- sapply(1:3, function(i) rnbinom(length(base), mu=base*effect, size=8)); out <- data.frame(gene_id=genes, cmat, tmat, check.names=FALSE); names(out) <- c("gene_id", "c1","c2","c3","t1","t2","t3"); write.table(out, "counts.tsv", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE); samples <- data.frame(sample=c("c1","c2","c3","t1","t2","t3"), condition=rep(c("control","treated"), each=3)); write.table(samples, "samples.tsv", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)' && rnaseq-deseq2 --counts counts.tsv --metadata samples.tsv --design '~ condition' --contrast condition:treated:control --fit-type local --outdir out && test -s out/results.tsv && test -s out/normalized_counts.tsv && test -s out/pca_plot.pdf && grep -F 'gene01' out/results.tsv >/dev/null

upstream.name: Bioconductor RNA-seq analysis runtime
upstream.license: Multiple open-source licenses across Bioconductor, CRAN, R, and system packages
upstream.citation: Bioconductor project; package-specific citations are available from citation(package)
